ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player (e.g., RF, 3B, SP) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Current age of the player */,
  "experience" REAL /* Years of experience of the player */,
  "free_agent_year" INTEGER /* Year the player becomes a free agent */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the player (e.g., right, left) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the contract belongs to */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Free Agent, Arbitration Extension) */,
  "contract_terms" TEXT /* Terms of the contract (e.g., years, salary) */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average annual salary of the contract */,
  "guaranteed_money" REAL /* Total guaranteed money in the contract */,
  "signing_bonus" REAL /* Signing bonus amount */,
  "yearly_breakdown" TEXT /* Yearly salary breakdown */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., MLB, NFL, NBA) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., American League East) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team's owner */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "acquisition_method" TEXT /* Method by which the player was acquired (e.g., draft, trade, free agency) */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the player was acquired */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date the player departed the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role the player had on the team (e.g., starter, reliever, bench) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, scout) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the statistic applies */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit by the player */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in by the player */,
  "earned_run_average" REAL /* Earned run average of the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks by the player */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_caps" (
  "cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary cap */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the salary cap applies */,
  "salary_cap" REAL /* Salary cap for the team */,
  "luxury_tax_threshold" REAL /* Luxury tax threshold for the team */,
  "payroll" REAL /* Total payroll for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_caps_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the transaction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, free agent signing) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the transaction */,
  "years" INTEGER /* Number of years of the transaction */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the award was won */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, Cy Young, Rookie of the Year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "estimated_recovery_time" TEXT /* Estimated recovery time for the injury */,
  "actual_recovery_time" TEXT /* Actual recovery time for the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats_advanced" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advanced player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the statistic applies */,
  "wRC" REAL /* Weighted Runs Created */,
  "wRAA" REAL /* Weighted Runs Above Average */,
  "WAR" REAL /* Wins Above Replacement */,
  "ERA" REAL /* Earned Run Average */,
  "FIP" REAL /* Fielding Independent Pitching */,
  "SIERA" REAL /* Skill-Interactive Earned Run Average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_advanced_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_cap_history" (
  "cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical salary cap */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the salary cap applies */,
  "salary_cap" REAL /* Salary cap for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_cap_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the statistic applies */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the team */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of runs allowed by the team */,
  "earned_run_average" REAL /* Earned run average of the team */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
